inputs.prompt: Project: The Teachers — a 3-part documentary series about teacher burnout. Data collected: filmed interviews with teachers (names, faces, voice, employment history), contact details for scheduling, photographs for website. Purpose: Documentary production and promotion. Controller: Clearview Productions Ltd. Third parties: Distributed via broadcast and streaming platforms. Retention: Duration of production plus 3 years. Sensitive data: Some interviews discuss mental health.

Project: audience survey for a newsletter about urban planning. Data collected: email addresses, job titles, survey responses. Controller: Sarah Mitchell, sole proprietor. Purpose: Editorial research.

Project: cross-border investigative podcast about labour exploitation in European agriculture. Data collected: audio interviews with migrant workers (some undocumented), location data from field recording, photographs, contact details. Controller: Lighthouse Media GmbH (Berlin). Third parties: Podcast hosting service, co-production partner in Spain. Retention: Indefinite for journalistic archive. Sensitive data: Immigration status, working conditions, health issues. Jurisdictions: Germany, Spain, Italy.
